Kraven the Hunter (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $25,026,310Details
International Box Office $34,985,118
Worldwide Box Office $60,011,428
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Kraven is a man whose complex relationship with his ruthless father, Nikolai Kravinoff, starts him down a path of vengeance with brutal consequences, motivating him to become not only the greatest hunter in the world, but also one of its most feared.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,001,109 (44.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.27 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:41.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$110,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,211 opening theaters/3,211 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $26,285,824

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 13th, 2024 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
December 13th, 2024 (IMAX) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: August 29th, 2024 (Wide) (Egypt)
August 30th, 2024 (IMAX), released as Kraven the Hunter (Крейвън Ловеца) (Bulgaria)
August 30th, 2024 (Wide), released as Kraven the Hunter (Крейвън Ловеца) (Bulgaria)
December 11th, 2024 (Wide) (Belgium)
December 12th, 2024 (Wide) (Sweden)
Video Release: January 14th, 2025 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence, and language.
Running Time: 127 minutes
Franchise: Sony’s Marvel Universe
Cast, crew, or production detail: Villain's Point of View
Filming location (country): Iceland, Scotland, United Kingdom
Plot point: Origin Story, Super Villains
Release detail: Disrupted by 2023 WGA & SAG Strikes
Source material: Marvel Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Sony Pictures, Columbia Pictures, Marvel Entertainment, Arad Productions, Matt Tolmach Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
